questionHtml: Explain one possible advantage and one possible disadvantage for the San Marcus economy of the decision to join the WTO and slowly liberalize trade.
markschemeHtml: NB Responses should refer to the economy of San Marcus, not just one industry such as the consumers or producers of cotton.
